state.next-action: PHASE 22 SESSION 6: install + plan-phase 25 + plan-phase 27. Session 6 shipped: (1) cleaned up stale GSD leftovers in portfolio .claude/ (.claude/get-shit-done/ and .claude/gsd-file-manifest.json deleted). (2) Installed all 27 GAD skills into .claude/skills/ AND .agents/skills/ — Claude Code now sees them (system reminder confirmed). (3) Installed all 21 GAD subagents into .claude/agents/ (was 10) AND .agents/agents/. (4) Installed 60 GAD commands into .agents/commands/gad/ (already present in .claude/commands/gad/). (5) Wrote .planning/plans/phase-25/PLAN.md — 22 atomic tasks across 4 milestones (A hooks+tool_use, B skill+subagent, C framework versioning, D site rendering). Phase 25 is execute-ready. (6) Wrote .planning/plans/phase-27/PLAN.md — 23 atomic tasks across 5 tracks (rubric, gates, derived metrics, query+insights, charts). Phase 27 is execute-ready and parallelizes with phase 25. (7) Added task 22-33 to automate the install process via `gad install` CLI subcommand — session 6 did it manually via filesystem copy; 22-33 is the permanent solution. NEXT SESSION: run `/gad:execute-phase 25` or `/gad:execute-phase 27` (or both via /gad:autonomous) to start shipping trace v4 or the rubric work. Both phases are independently revertible and can proceed in parallel.
